ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., DFS) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Sector code of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Industry code of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Exchange code */,
  "exchange_country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_mapping" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Listing status of the stock on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the widget is part of */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_order" INTEGER /* Order of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "widget_size" TEXT /* Size of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the type of machine learning model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the stock */,
  "prediction_probability" REAL /* Probability of the predicted value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the type of action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the type of data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestion" (
  "ingestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data ingestion */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date of the data ingestion */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the ingested data file */,
  "ingestion_method" TEXT /* Method used for data ingestion */,
  "ingestion_status" TEXT /* Status of the data ingestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "ingestion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data ingestion */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the data validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the data validation */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule applied to the data */,
  "validation_result_code" TEXT /* Code for the result of the data validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_ingestion_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingestion_id") REFERENCES data_ingestion ("ingestion_id")
)
